ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tag_detection_configs" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "detect_inverted_tags" INTEGER /* Flag to detect tags with black and white exchanged */,
  "forget_after_n_detections" INTEGER /* Number of detection runs after which to forget about a previous tag */,
  "max_corner_distance" REAL /* Maximum distance of corresponding tag corners in meters */,
  "quality" TEXT /* Quality of tag detection (High, Medium, or Low) */,
  "use_cached_images" INTEGER /* Flag to use the most recent image pair instead of waiting for a new pair */,
  "min_tag_size" INTEGER /* Minimum allowed size of the tag in pixels */,
  "max_tag_size" INTEGER /* Maximum allowed size of the tag in pixels */,
  "allowed_tag_orientations" TEXT /* Allowed orientations for the tag (e.g., portrait, landscape, square) */,
  "detection_timeout" INTEGER /* Timeout in seconds for the detection process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "detection_history" (
  "detection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each detection event */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the detection occurred */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the configuration used during detection */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the detected tag */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the detection (successful or failed) */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the image used for detection */,
  "detection_time" REAL /* Time taken for the detection process */,
  "processing_time" REAL /* Time taken for image processing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_detection_history_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_detection_history_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES tag_detection_configs ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_type" TEXT /* Type of the tag (e.g., RFID, QR Code) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag's purpose or usage */,
  "tag_format" TEXT /* Format of the tag data (e.g., text, binary) */,
  "data_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the tag data in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., administrator, engineer) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "config_change_logs" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change log entry */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the configuration that was changed */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "old_config_values" TEXT /* Old configuration values before the change */,
  "new_config_values" TEXT /* New configuration values after the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_change_logs_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES tag_detection_configs ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_change_logs_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "detection_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting (e.g., timeout_duration, retry_count) */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "setting_description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_pairs" (
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the image pair */,
  "image_one_path" TEXT /* File path to the first image */,
  "image_two_path" TEXT /* File path to the second image */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the image pair was captured */,
  "image_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the images (e.g., high, low, medium) */,
  "image_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the images (e.g., 1080p, 720p) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "detection_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the detection model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model in percentage */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_usage_logs" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage log entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used for the detection */,
  "detection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the detection event */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was used */,
  "model_performance" REAL /* Performance of the model during the detection process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_usage_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES detection_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_usage_logs_detection_id FOREIGN KEY ("detection_id") REFERENCES detection_history ("detection_id")
)
